desc.zh: 我在 AI 学习中发现的优质资源，分享给同样在路上的你。
desc.en: Quality resources I have discovered on my AI learning journey, shared with fellow learners.

desc.zh: 李沐的深度学习课程，代码+理论结合，非常适合入门
desc.en: Li Mu's deep learning course — code and theory combined, ideal for beginners

desc.zh: 斯坦福经典 ML 课程，Andrew Ng 主讲，理论扎实
desc.en: Stanford's classic ML course by Andrew Ng

desc.zh: AI 领域的百科全书式教材，我目前正在读
desc.en: The encyclopedia of AI textbooks — I am currently reading this

desc.zh: 自上而下的教学法，先跑起来再理解原理
desc.en: Top-down approach — run first, understand later

desc.zh: 我正要开始学的深度学习框架
desc.en: The DL framework I am starting to learn

desc.zh: 本地运行大模型的最简单方式
desc.en: Easiest way to run LLMs locally

desc.zh: 模型和数据集的 GitHub，开源模型宝库
desc.en: The GitHub of models and datasets

desc.zh: 深入浅出的大模型技术博客，每篇都值得精读
desc.en: In-depth LLM technical blog — every post is worth reading carefully

desc.zh: B站最好的论文讲解系列，适合入门科研
desc.en: Best paper walkthrough series on Bilibili for research beginners

desc.zh: 最直观的数学可视化，神经网络系列必看
desc.en: The most intuitive math visualization — neural networks series is a must-watch

desc.zh: 读开源代码是最好的学习方式
desc.en: Reading open source code is the best way to learn

desc.zh: 数据集 + 竞赛 + 学习笔记，一站式平台
desc.en: Datasets + competitions + learning notebooks, all in one

desc.zh: AI 论文预印本，跟踪最新研究动态
desc.en: AI paper preprints — track the latest research
